query_analysis.query: how much does Bakery cost Singapore
competitors_mentioned: Rental:** SGD 3,000 to SGD 15,000+ per month for commercial space, depending on area.
Equipment:** SGD 20,000 to SGD 100,000+ for ovens, mixers, display cases.
Licenses & Permits:** SGD 200 to SGD 1,000 for food shop licenses from the Singapore Food Agency.
Ingredients & Supplies:** Ongoing costs vary based on product range.
Staff:** Salaries depend on number and skill level.
**Quality & Freshness** – Look for bakeries known for fresh, high-quality ingredients and well-reviewed products.
**Variety** – Choose a bakery offering a range of items that suit your taste, whether traditional breads, pastries, or cakes.
**Specialty** – Some bakeries specialize in certain styles (e.g., French, Japanese, artisanal sourdough).
**Customer Reviews** – Check online reviews on platforms like Google, Facebook, or food blogs for honest feedback.
**Location & Convenience** – Pick a bakery near you or one that offers delivery.

recommended_actions.title: Improve brand visibility in AI answers
recommended_actions.why_it_matters: If the brand is not being surfaced in answer engines, competitors are more likely to be recommended first.
recommended_actions.recommended_fix: Prioritize direct-answer pages, comparison pages, and FAQ-led content for missed commercial and recommendation-style queries.
recommended_actions.support_signal: Low visibility score across the latest audit.

recommended_actions.title: Clarify brand and entity signals
recommended_actions.why_it_matters: If your site does not clearly explain who you are, what you offer, and how you differ, answer engines may prefer more explicit competitors.
recommended_actions.recommended_fix: Strengthen homepage, about page, and core service pages with clearer positioning, repeated brand signals, proof, and differentiators.
